description: Baseline capability for the main window. Scoped narrowly; permissions are added per-milestone as features land (spec §9). `dialog:allow-open` (M1) lets the webview invoke the native open-file dialog; the file itself is read by the Rust `load_alignment` command, so no `fs` permission is needed. `clipboard-manager:allow-write-text` (selection copy) lets the webview write the copied block to the system clipboard; `clipboard-manager:allow-read-text` (paste, Batch C) lets it read text back to paste over the selection — text only, no image clipboard access.
